severity_policy: All issues must be classified by severity and scope. P0 issues must block v4.0. P1 issues must be fixed or explicitly reviewed before v4.0. P2 issues may be documented as future improvements. Low-risk issues may be fixed immediately, but high-risk issues must not be ignored, hidden, or bypassed.

p0_blockers.reason: Current Core has local keyword/index paths, deterministic query planning, rerank/evidence/verification reports, embedding export, and vector export files. It does not prove industrial vector database readiness because no real Milvus/Pinecone/Qdrant/Chroma write/query path, production hybrid keyword/vector retrieval path, metadata-filtered vector query path, rebuild policy, or stale index detection has been implemented and tested end-to-end.
p0_blockers.user_impact: The product claim cannot be safely presented as complete until this is resolved or explicitly accepted.
p0_blockers.recommended_fix: Do not claim vector DB or hybrid vector retrieval production readiness until real adapter writes, query paths, metadata filters, lifecycle rebuild, and stale-index detection are implemented and tested.

p1_blockers.reason: UI validation is not attached or did not pass. UI must be validated or honestly scoped before v4.0.
p1_blockers.user_impact: The product claim cannot be safely presented as complete until this is resolved or explicitly accepted.
p1_blockers.recommended_fix: Run Flutter analyze/test/build validation without modifying UI, then regenerate the report.

p2_issues.reason: More real documents and domain samples would improve release confidence.
p2_issues.user_impact: The product claim cannot be safely presented as complete until this is resolved or explicitly accepted.
p2_issues.recommended_fix: Add broader real samples in a future hardening pass.

issue_checklist.reason: Contradictory verification sources honestly produce status=warning score=0.6715 review_required=True; not forced to pass.

issue_checklist.reason: Update/archive/delete/rollback lifecycle appears partial. Cleanup plans exist, but destructive actions are not enabled by default, which is safe but means lifecycle CRUD is not fully proven.
issue_checklist.user_impact: The product claim cannot be safely presented as complete until this is resolved or explicitly accepted.
issue_checklist.recommended_fix: Keep destructive lifecycle actions unsupported by default and document the non-destructive cleanup/archive boundary.

ui_validation.reason: UI repo frozen; Core audit classifies UI as contract_viewer_only, not full user-operable Workbench.

product_architecture_completeness.reason: The large bilingual acceptance pass proves many local Core paths, but final product architecture is not complete enough for v4.0 because RAG vector/index industrial readiness and full UI operation are not proven.

layers.reason: Mixed large input build is proven, but scanned PDF OCR was intentionally capped and unsupported-file error coverage remains partial.
Core package construction is solid for local package creation, but the final gate should not overclaim universal structure-aware parsing for all document classes.
Export-only vector artifacts are not production vector DB readiness.
Non-destructive lifecycle reporting exists. Destructive cleanup and automatic full update/regeneration workflows are not claimed as implemented.
Synthetic scale checks are useful but not industrial proof for 1500 real books, KBs, and Agents.
Local runtime smoke and KB boundary are fixed. This is not a full autonomous Agent Runtime or long-term memory database.
UI repo is frozen in this pass. Core contracts exist, but full user-operable local Workbench is not proven and must not be claimed.
Local privacy boundary is clear, but optional live provider and BYO/cloud boundaries must remain truthfully scoped.

product_architecture_completeness.reason: Architecture has at least one P0 blocker in RAG vector/index industrial readiness.

ui_full_operation_readiness.reason: UI full operation is not claimed in this Core-only pass.

lifecycle_update_readiness.reason: Lifecycle update/rebuild/regenerate flow is partial and non-destructive by default.

scale_1500_kb_agent_readiness.reason: 1500-scale proof is synthetic/partial, not a real production workload.

rag_vector_index_readiness.reason: Current Core has local keyword/index paths, deterministic query planning, rerank/evidence/verification reports, embedding export, and vector export files. It does not prove industrial vector database readiness because no real Milvus/Pinecone/Qdrant/Chroma write/query path, production hybrid keyword/vector retrieval path, metadata-filtered vector query path, rebuild policy, or stale index detection has been implemented and tested end-to-end.

vector_retrieval_status.reason: Embedding/vector artifacts can be exported locally, but no production vector query path is proven.

hybrid_keyword_vector_retrieval_status.reason: The config may use the word hybrid for planning, but no tested production hybrid keyword/vector query path is attached.

embedding_provider_configuration.reason: Provider configuration and fake/offline embedding generation exist; real provider acceptance is optional and not inherited by this Codex process.

vector_db_adapter_status.reason: No real vector DB write/query smoke is implemented and tested.

metadata_filtering.reason: Local scope/filter helpers exist, but metadata-filtered vector retrieval is not proven.

claim_verification.reason: Local claim verification exists; external retrieval verification remains out of current implementation.

freshness_contradiction_accuracy_scoring.reason: Contradictory sources produce warning/review, not pass.

incremental_update_or_rebuild_policy.reason: Source change and lifecycle reports exist, but vector index rebuild and stale vector index detection are not proven.

stale_index_detection.reason: No dedicated stale vector index detection proof is attached.

rag_vector_index_readiness.recommended_fix: Implement and test real local/adapter vector query paths, metadata filters, hybrid retrieval routing, index rebuild policy, and stale-index diagnostics before clearing this P0.

scanned_pdf_full_ocr.reason: 120 OCR candidate pages were detected, but build used max_ocr_pages=8.

unsupported_files_stable_errors.reason: Stable error paths exist, but broad unsupported corpus coverage is not final-product proof.

must_not_claim: universal parser support for every file type

per_agent_api_mapping.reason: Provider/profile governance exists, but per-Agent live provider mapping is not fully proven through real API acceptance.

must_not_claim: real live provider acceptance completed in this Codex process

per_agent_api_mapping_readiness.reason: Provider/profile governance exists, but per-Agent live provider mapping is not fully proven through real API acceptance.

must_not_claim: dynamic runtime network proof for every path
full UI security acceptance in this Core-only pass
UI can complete end-to-end workflows without Core CLI

scale_1500_kb_agent_readiness.reason: 1500-scale proof is synthetic/partial, not a real production workload.

final_gate_rule: Do not start v4.0 automatically. If the product is not ready, mark blocked.
recommendation: blocked: resolve P0 blockers and review/fix blocking P1 items before v4.0.
next_action: Work the issue_checklist from P0 to P1 to P2; regenerate this report after each fix batch.
